type.name: type_core_las
type.property: +section title="Log ASCII: {{name}}" {{group}} {{display_profile showMenu=true yAxisReverse=true marginTop=25 profileMode="lines" indexField=".*depth.*" #fields="#2,#3"}}
type.wikimacro: {{core_profiles showMenu=true yAxisReverse=true marginTop=25 profileMode=markers profileMode="lines" indexField=".*depth.*" #fields="#2,#3"}}
type.wiki:
+section title="Log ASCII: {{name}}" :navtop +row +col-8 {{property max=10000}} {{group requestFields="skip,stride,limit" chartLeft=100 requestFieldsShow=false }} {{description wikify=true}} :heading Chart {{display_filter loadingMessage="icon_progress" showMenu=false requestFieldsShow=true noDataMessage="No data available"}} {{core_profiles showMenu=true yAxisReverse=true marginTop=25 profileMode="lines" indexField=".*depth.*" #fields="#2"}} :heading Table {{display_download}} {{display_table}} :vspace 1em ---- :vspace 1em :heading Information {{information details="true" showTitle="false" }} -col +col-4 {{field name="top_depth" row.label="Top Depth:"}} {{field name="bottom_depth" row.label="Bottom Depth:"}}
+center {{mapentry hideIfNoLocations=true width="90%" height="200px"}} -center -col -row -section
